hero.title: Cash-In-Transit (CIT)
hero.subtitle: High-risk routes. High-value cargo. Zero room for failure. GSI delivers armored transport engineered for absolute reliability and controlled end-to-end with advanced monitoring.

problem.title: Moving cash has never been more complex — or more exposed.
problem.text: Increasing route theft, coordinated attacks, insider risks, and operational gaps demand a CIT partner capable of guaranteeing operational continuity under any scenario.

value.title: Armored transport engineered for mission-critical operations.
value.text1: Our CIT units operate under hardened protocols, trained personnel, real-time GPS monitoring, and rapid-response integration with command centers.
value.text2: We transport cash, valuables, confidential documents, ATM loads, and high-value assets across the country with precision and consistency.

hero.title: Cargo You Can Track. Routes You Can Trust.
hero.subtitle: Real-time visibility, risk-engineered routes, and high-security logistics for sensitive, high-value, or mission-critical cargo.

problem.title: High-value cargo is a target. Without visibility, you're exposed.
problem.text: Theft, route interception, insider coordination, and inefficient monitoring systems threaten operational continuity. GSI provides a hardened logistics framework with sensors, escorts, monitoring centers, and real-time alerts.

value.title: Your cargo, mapped, monitored, and secured from origin to destination.
value.text1: We control every movement: environmental sensors, GPS units, telematics, escort vehicles, and integrated response teams.
value.text2: Our monitoring centers track routes 24/7, enforce route compliance, detect anomalies, and trigger immediate interventions.

gps.text: Live location, deviation alerts, and geofence controls.

route.text: Smart route selection based on risk maps, crime data, and operational constraints.

escort.text: High-risk lanes protected by trained escort teams.

telematics.text: Door sensors, vibration detection, ambient monitoring, and tamper protections.

incident.title: Incident Response Integration
incident.text: Command center escalation, remote lockdown, and emergency procedures.

reporting.title: Full Journey Reporting
reporting.text: Detailed delivery confirmations and audit-ready documentation.
